title: Rust Source
documentation:
## Purpose
Rust source files contain code written in the Rust systems programming language, which emphasizes memory safety without a garbage collector, zero-cost abstractions, and high performance. Rust is used for systems software, WebAssembly, embedded targets, and high-performance services.

## When to use
Use [Rust Source](https://capdag.com/browse/media:rust;textable;code) for any `.rs` file in a Rust crate. Rust projects are organized via Cargo; the source tree under `src/` holds the actual Rust files while `Cargo.toml` holds the manifest.

## Notes
Rust source is UTF-8 text. The compiler enforces strict ownership and borrowing rules at compile time, which eliminates many classes of runtime errors. Rust edition (2015, 2018, 2021, 2024) affects syntax and some language semantics; the edition is declared in `Cargo.toml` and should be considered when parsing or analyzing source.
